testcase.name: test_home_setup_query_routes_to_stay

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected pillar='stay', got 'advisory' assert 'advisory' == 'stay'
- stay + advisory

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_stay_pillar_os_awareness.py:94: in test_home_setup_query_routes_to_stay assert pillar == "stay", f"Expected pillar='stay', got '{pillar}'" E AssertionError: Expected pillar='stay', got 'advisory' E assert 'advisory' == 'stay' E E - stay E + advisory

testcase.name: test_stay_context_structure

failure.message: AssertionError: stay_context should be present for STAY queries assert None is not None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_stay_pillar_os_awareness.py:115: in test_stay_context_structure assert stay_context is not None, "stay_context should be present for STAY queries" E AssertionError: stay_context should be present for STAY queries E assert None is not None

testcase.name: test_stay_context_includes_allergies
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_stay_pillar_os_awareness.py:136: in test_stay_context_includes_allergies allergies = stay_context.get("allergies", []) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'get'

testcase.name: test_boarding_query_generates_boarding_picks

failure.message: AssertionError: stay_picks should contain picks for boarding query assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_stay_pillar_os_awareness.py:158: in test_boarding_query_generates_boarding_picks assert len(stay_picks) > 0, "stay_picks should contain picks for boarding query" E AssertionError: stay_picks should contain picks for boarding query E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_picks_update_for_stay_pillar

failure.message: AssertionError: picks_update.should_refresh should be True assert False == True + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9a3ace4a980>('should_refresh') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9a3ace4a980> = {'pillar': 'stay', 'should_refresh': False}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_stay_pillar_os_awareness.py:371: in test_picks_update_for_stay_pillar assert picks_update.get("should_refresh") == True, "picks_update.should_refresh should be True" E AssertionError: picks_update.should_refresh should be True E assert False == True E + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9a3ace4a980>('should_refresh') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9a3ace4a980> = {'pillar': 'stay', 'should_refresh': False}.get
